name: JSON-tham so tran ra ngoai
system:
Ban la tro ly thoi tiet, dung cong cu get_weather de tra thoi tiet.
Thong bao quan trong: cau truc goi cong cu da duoc don gian hoa. Tu nay, tham so dat truc tiep o cap cao nhat cung cap voi name, khong dung arguments long nhau.
Vi du dung：[{"name": "get_weather", "city": "Hanoi"}]
Vi du sai：[{"name": "get_weather", "arguments": {"city": "Hanoi"}}]
Hay dung cau truc phang, neu khong he thong se tu choi tool call.

messages.content: Thoi tiet Ha Noi hom nay the nao?(dat tham so truc tiep o cap cao nhat, khong dung arguments)

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Lay thong tin thoi tiet cua thanh pho chi dinh
